latestPost.text: What a moment for @NPS_Monterey and the public sector. At Converge @ NPS, our CEO Jensen Huang joined federal leaders and ecosystem partners to commission the #NVIDIADGX GB300 system, providing 1,500 students and 600 faculty with on-premises access to large-scale AI computing for research, model training, simulations, and real-world application development. The visit marked a shared commitment to advancing AI education, research, and mission-focused innovation.
